title: Company VPN Connection Guide
content:
## VPN Connection Steps

1. Download and install the FortiClient VPN client
2. Open FortiClient and click [Remote Access]
3. Enter server address: vpn.company.com
4. Log in with your company email account and password
5. Select [Full Tunnel Mode] to connect

## Common Issues
- Connection timeout: Check your network connection and ensure the firewall is not blocking VPN port (443)
- Authentication failure: Confirm your password has not expired; you can reset it at https://password.company.com
- Cannot access intranet after connecting: Try disconnecting and reconnecting, or contact IT hotline ext.8888

## Important Notes
- VPN password syncs with your email password and must be changed every 90 days
- Special VPN permissions must be requested in advance for overseas business trips

title: New Employee IT Device Request Process
content:
## Request Process

1. Log into the OA system - Asset Management - Device Request
2. Fill out the request form (requires department manager approval)
3. IT department processes the request within 2 business days
4. You will be notified to pick up the device once it is ready

## Standard Configuration
- Laptop: MacBook Pro 14-inch or ThinkPad X1 Carbon
- Monitor: Dell 27-inch 4K
- Keyboard & Mouse: Your choice (budget up to 500 CNY)
- Phone: Assigned based on job level

## Important Notes
- All IT devices must be returned upon resignation
- Damaged devices must go through the repair request process
- Unauthorized software installation is not permitted

title: Remote Work Guidelines and Tools
content:
## Remote Work Basic Requirements

1. You must connect via company VPN to access internal systems (see VPN Connection Guide kb_001)
2. Stay online on WeCom during work hours
3. Attend the daily team standup (09:00)

## Recommended Tools
- Communication & Collaboration: WeCom (required), Lark (optional)
- Document Collaboration: Confluence + Google Docs
- Code Collaboration: GitLab (requires VPN for intranet access)
- Video Conferencing: Tencent Meeting (preferred), Zoom (for external client meetings)

## Network Requirements
- Recommended bandwidth: Download 50Mbps+ / Upload 10Mbps+
- Video conferencing requires a stable network environment
- If your home network is unstable, you can apply for a mobile hotspot subsidy (100 CNY/month)

## Security Reminders
- Do not handle sensitive files on public WiFi
- Set lock screen timeout to 5 minutes auto-lock
- Recording or screenshotting internal company meetings is prohibited (unless approved)

title: Employee Leave Policy
content:
## Annual Leave Entitlement
- 1 year of service: 5 days
- 3 years of service: 10 days
- 5 years of service: 15 days

## Leave Request Process
1. Submit request via OA system
2. Direct supervisor approval
3. Requests of 3+ days require department director approval

## Important Notes
- Annual leave must be requested at least 3 business days in advance
- Unused annual leave can be carried over to the next year (up to 5 days)
- Sick leave requires a hospital certificate

title: Password Security Policy and Reset Guide
content:
## Password Policy
- Minimum length: 12 characters
- Must include: uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, special characters
- Validity period: 90 days
- Cannot reuse the last 5 passwords

## Reset Methods
1. Self-service reset: Visit https://password.company.com
2. Via the WeCom IT bot
3. Contact IT hotline ext.8888

## MFA Multi-Factor Authentication
- MFA is mandatory for all systems
- Recommended: Microsoft Authenticator
- Backup method: SMS verification code

## Account Lockout
- 5 consecutive failed password attempts will lock the account for 30 minutes
- After lockout, you can self-unlock or contact IT

title: VPN Client Update Notice
content:
## Important Notice

Following an assessment by the company's IT Security Committee, the FortiClient VPN client will no longer be supported starting March 1, 2026.

**Replacement:**
Please migrate to the GlobalProtect VPN client (Palo Alto Networks).

**Migration Steps:**
1. Uninstall FortiClient
2. Download GlobalProtect from https://vpn.company.com/downloads
3. Connect using the same server address and credentials

**Note:** This notice takes priority over the FortiClient guide in kb_001. If you have questions, contact IT hotline ext.8888.

Reference: The old VPN guide (kb_001) will be updated after the migration is complete.

title: Remote Work Common Troubleshooting
content:
## FAQ

This article supplements the Remote Work Guidelines and Tools (kb_003), compiling common remote work technical issues reported by employees.

### VPN Issues
- Connection timeout: Refer to the firewall settings in the VPN Connection Guide
- Frequent disconnections: Switch to 5GHz WiFi or use a wired connection

### Video Conferencing Lag
- Close other bandwidth-consuming applications
- Use Tencent Meeting's audio-priority mode

### File Sync Failures
- Check VPN connection status
- Verify Confluence space permissions
- For large files (>100MB), use the company FTP server
